package rulefixtures

import (
	ssh "golang.org/x/crypto/ssh"
)

// scenario for ssh_host_key_callback_insecure: `ssh.ClientConfig{HostKeyCallback: ssh.InsecureIgnoreHostKey()}` in non-test code
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario735Positive(user string) *ssh.ClientConfig {
	return &ssh.ClientConfig{User: user, HostKeyCallback: ssh.InsecureIgnoreHostKey()}
}
